calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Regarding Internal Affairs Of Trust And Instructions To Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Louise Rodriguez.

Ms. Ebey spoke of the settlors intent to place the property in the trust, addressed the issue of notice to all prior beneficiaries, stated that it is awkward to send notice to parties informing them that they are not getting anything, and that if notice is the only issue holding this matter up she could remove that part (request to validate 5th amendment) from the petition. Ms. Ebey also stated that the property was incorrectly left out of the trust through refinancing. Ms. Rodriguez stated to the court that it was their intent that the property go through the trust. The petition for order confirming trust assets was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clark. (Not Reported)
